result.title: 组合新增-商城业务-北京市-指定参与客户-满立折-指定可参与店铺-原厂件
result.error_message: [SKI313] 关键字 'evaluate' 重试 1 次后仍失败: [SKI302] JavaScript 执行失败: Page.evaluate: Error: 真实保存组合用例默认关闭。启用前需确认业务线、北京市/C0012278/GZJD0001/原厂件在测试环境可选，并补充保存后列表查询与清理步骤。combo={"businessScope":"商城业务","areaMode":"按区域设置","area":"北京市","customerMode":"指定参与客户","customerCode":"C0012278","promotionType":"满立折","condition":"满100打8折","marketingFee":"不设上限","stackRule":"不叠加","storeMode":"指定可参与店铺","storeCode":"GZJD0001","productScope":"按品类配置","qualityMode":"指定品质","quality":"原厂件","brandMode":"不限品牌","categoryMode":"不限品类"} at eval (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:1:369) at eval (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:1:488) at eval (<anonymous>) at UtilityScript.evaluate (<anonymous>:234:30) at UtilityScript.<anonymous> (<anonymous>:1:44) keyword: evaluate
